stemHtml: An aircrafts autothrottle/autothrust system is capable of providing control modes such as (1) _____ and (2) _____. When the aircraft is taking off, (3) _____ mode is normally selected. When it has reached the selected altitude, the autothrust mode then remains in/switches to (4) _____.

options.a: (1) Constant thrust output; (2) variable thrust output; (3) TO/GA; (4) SPEED
options.b: (1) Vertical speed; (2) pitch attitude; (3) N1 hold; (4) TO/GA
options.c: (1) Mach or IAS hold; (2) flight path angle; (3) IAS hold; (4) V/S
options.d: (1) Variable thrust output; (2) pitch attitude; (3) SPEED; (4) LVL CHG
